message:
test(telemetry): add comprehensive test coverage for protocol and schema

Adds extensive test coverage for the telemetry subsystem:

protocol.rs tests:
- TestRunRecord serialization/deserialization roundtrip
- TestRunRecord construction from CompilationKind
- Exit code handling (success, failure, build error)
- TestRunStats default state and accumulation
- StatsUpdate aggregation and JSON formatting
- WorkerTelemetry parsing and validation
- Piggyback marker detection and extraction
- Edge cases: empty responses, malformed data, boundary values

schema.rs tests:
- Database schema creation and migration
- Insert/query operations for test run records
- Stats aggregation queries
- Time-based filtering
- Project/worker isolation
- Concurrent access patterns

This brings telemetry test coverage to production-ready levels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
